mechanism_summary: I2S adds per-exec CMP-buffer cost with no substitution benefit: the gate is a pointer-arithmetic relation (start>=end), not an input-byte literal, so vpc's extra I2S stage yields no traction while lowering throughput relative to plain value_profile.
one_line: Pointer-arithmetic emptiness check; I2S has no literal to substitute

mechanism_summary: I2S splices valid-version comparands (magic 'lcms', version 0x03) back into the corpus, pulling seeds toward structurally-valid headers whose version byte stays <=0x09 and away from the >0x09 overflow side; winner reaches it by plain havoc.
one_line: Version byte >0x09 gate; I2S steers corpus toward valid version bytes

mechanism_summary: I2S offers no help because PNG_FIXED_ERROR is an internal sentinel produced by overflow arithmetic with no input-byte pre-image to splice; meanwhile I2S's per-CMP callback overhead lowers throughput, so naive's undirected havoc reaches the sentinel faster.
one_line: Internal overflow sentinel; I2S cannot substitute a computed value

mechanism_summary: I2S copies in-range fixed-point operands from CMP intercepts back into the bluex field, biasing the corpus away from the overflow range that decodes to the error sentinel; naive's undirected havoc stumbles the bytes into that range without any such pull-back.
one_line: Fixed-point overflow sentinel; I2S pulls bluex bytes toward valid range

mechanism_summary: I2S clears structural CMP roadblocks (length, CRC, magic) and drives the corpus toward large valid images deep in IDAT decoding, starving bKGD chunk bytes of random mutation; naive keeps inputs small and blindly randomizes chunk bytes, eventually flipping a high background byte non-zero.
one_line: Non-zero high background bytes; I2S drags corpus to valid IDAT-heavy inputs

mechanism_summary: I2S adds per-execution CmpLog-buffer overhead but provides no comparison-solving benefit on this loop-state branch (not gated by an exact comparand in input bytes); the overhead lowers throughput relative to plain value_profile, which reaches the state via havoc.
one_line: IDAT loop-state check; I2S overhead taxes throughput with no traction

mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged operands into the corpus, diverting mutation energy toward sibling encoding magic constants (e.g. UTF16BE), so the loser resolves a different gate rather than assembling the UCS4_2143 00 00 3C 00 window; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient climbs toward it without that diversion.
one_line: 4-byte UCS4_2143 magic; I2S diverts corpus to sibling encoding gates

mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged exact-literal comparands ('<![CDATA[', '<?xml', '<!DOCTYPE') back into the corpus, biasing seeds toward completing those multi-byte gates and the CDATA state machine rather than taking the false-side general-parse path; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient diversifies content leads without that pull.
one_line: 9-byte CDATA literal AND-chain false side; I2S biases corpus toward CDATA entry
